title: [OID4VCI] Support for credentials CRUD (DB and admin REST endpoints)
overview: This PR adds CRUD support for verifiable credentials (OID4VCI) on users: a new `USER_VER_CREDENTIAL` DB table, a `UserProvider` SPI extension, a new admin REST sub-resource mounted at `GET/POST/DELETE /users/{id}/vc/credentials`, and integration tests. Read outside-in: REST contract first, then the server-side endpoint, then the storage stack (UserProvider → JPA entity/queries), and finally tests.

chapters.title: REST contract: UserVerifiableCredentialRepresentation and client-side resource interface
Admin REST entrypoint: wiring UserVerifiableCredentialResource into UserResource
Model/SPI layer: UserVerifiableCredentialModel and UserProvider contract
JPA persistence: DB schema, entity, and JpaUserProvider implementation
Tests: CRUD, error paths, and permission coverage

units.layerReason: Outward-facing data contract; shared between client and server
units.summary: New wire representation for a verifiable credential — holds credentialScopeName, revision, and createdDate

units.layerReason: Admin-client JAX-RS proxy interface, consumed by callers before any server code
units.summary: New admin-client proxy interface exposing createCredential, getCredentials, and revokeCredential under path /vc/credentials; requires OID4VC_VCI feature and verifiable credentials enabled on the realm

units.layerReason: Entry point on the existing admin-client UserResource interface
units.summary: Adds the @Path("vc") sub-resource accessor to the admin-client UserResource interface

units.layerReason: Server-side entrypoint that instantiates and delegates to the new sub-resource
units.summary: Mounts the new UserVerifiableCredentialResource at @Path("vc") on the existing admin UserResource

units.layerReason: The core application-layer handler for the new endpoints
units.summary: Implements createCredential, getCredentials, and revokeCredential. createCredential validates that the named client scope exists and has the oid4vc protocol, then delegates to session.users(). All three methods guard on OID4VC_VCI feature flag and realm.isVerifiableCredentialsEnabled(). Auto-generates revision and createdDate if not supplied; rejects caller-supplied values to prevent clock skew / replay attacks.

units.layerReason: Internal domain model; consumed by provider implementations
units.summary: New model class carrying the same three fields as the representation; credentialScopeName is immutable (constructor-only)

units.layerReason: SPI interface extended with three new methods
units.summary: Declares addVerifiableCredential, removeVerifiableCredential, and getVerifiableCredentialsByUser on UserProvider; Javadoc clarifies field-generation contract

units.layerReason: Database migration; must be read before the entity to understand the table shape
units.summary: Liquibase changeset creating USER_VER_CREDENTIAL table with PK, FK to USER_ENTITY, and unique constraint on (CREDENTIAL_SCOPE_NAME, USER_ID)

units.layerReason: JPA entity mapping the new table
units.summary: JPA entity with four named queries: fetch-by-user, bulk-delete by user/realm/clientScope. The unique constraint mirrors the DB schema, enforcing one credential per scope per user.

units.layerReason: Required registration of the new entity with the persistence unit
units.summary: Registers UserVerifiableCredentialEntity in the default persistence unit

units.layerReason: Core JPA implementation of the new UserProvider methods
units.summary: Implements add/remove/get for verifiable credentials. addVerifiableCredential auto-generates revision (SecretGenerator) and createdDate (Time.currentTimeMillis) when absent. preRemove hooks delete credentials when a user, realm, or client scope is removed — preventing orphans.

units.layerReason: Cache layer adapter; pass-through without caching for now
units.summary: Forwards all three verifiable-credential methods directly to the delegate. No caching is added; noted as a follow-up.

units.layerReason: Storage manager adapter; routing layer between local and federated storage
units.summary: Routes all three methods to localStorage() for local users; explicitly throws UnsupportedOperationException for federated users (acknowledged as a known limitation with follow-up planned)

units.layerReason: Test utility; needed to verify admin event paths in tests
units.summary: Adds URI builder helpers for the two new admin event resource paths

units.layerReason: Integration tests for the new capability
units.summary: Covers: full CRUD lifecycle, conflict (duplicate scope), automatic cascade-delete when a client scope is removed, cascade-delete when a realm is removed, 400 when feature/realm flag disabled, 400 for unknown or non-OID4VC scope, and 400 for caller-supplied createdDate or revision.

units.layerReason: Verifies RBAC enforcement on the new endpoints
units.summary: Asserts that getCredentials requires USER read permission and createCredential/revokeCredential require USER manage permission
